target: Verify 4 reported issues: Grammar Game bug fixes, Lesson Roadmap, Warmup images, PDF Worksheet
summary: All 4 features/fixes verified working. P0 Grammar Game 'Build the Sentence' normalization fix confirmed - 'It is one' now correctly matches 'It is one.' (with period). P1 Lesson Roadmap shows 6 steps with winding path. P1 Warmup images display emoji above questions. P2 PDF Worksheet button visible in Lesson Summary.

P0_grammar_game_build_sentence_fix.description: Build the Sentence evaluation now correctly marks answers as correct despite period mismatch
P0_grammar_game_build_sentence_fix.evidence: Playwright test: arranged words 'It', 'is', 'one' and clicked Check Answer - result showed 'Perfect!' instead of incorrect
P0_grammar_game_build_sentence_fix.root_cause: Seed data has words=['It','is','one'] (no period) but correct_sentence='It is one.' (with period). Fix normalizes both strings.

P0_grammar_game_fill_blank_case_insensit.description: Fill in the Blank now uses case-insensitive comparison
P0_grammar_game_fill_blank_case_insensit.evidence: Code review confirms optLower and correct_answer are both .toLowerCase().trim() compared

P1_lesson_roadmap.description: Visual winding path roadmap appears FIRST when entering any lesson
P1_lesson_roadmap.evidence: Playwright test: navigated to lesson, found [data-testid='lesson-roadmap'], 6 roadmap steps visible, 'Start Lesson' button present

P1_warmup_images.description: RetrievalWarmup displays image_emoji above question text
P1_warmup_images.evidence: Playwright test: warmup question showed '1️⃣' emoji in styled container above 'What does the number 1 mean?'

P2_pdf_worksheet_download.description: Download Worksheet (PDF) button appears in Lesson Summary
P2_pdf_worksheet_download.evidence: Playwright test: found [data-testid='download-worksheet-btn'] with text 'Download Worksheet (PDF)'
P2_pdf_worksheet_download.note: PDF generation is client-side only using jsPDF - MOCKED backend-wise

api_test_results.grammar_game_word_order_pattern: PASS - words have no period, correct_sentence has period, normalization works
api_test_results.fill_blank_items_structure: PASS - all items have sentence, options, correct_answer

critical_code_review_comments: checkWordOrder() fix correctly normalizes strings by stripping trailing punctuation [.!?,;:] and lowercasing
handleFillBlank() uses toLowerCase().trim() for case-insensitive comparison
LessonRoadmap component properly groups activities into 6 visual steps
RetrievalWarmup correctly renders image_emoji in styled container when present
generatePDF() uses jsPDF for client-side PDF generation (no backend required)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 features verified. Grammar Game now correctly evaluates Build the Sentence by normalizing punctuation. Lesson Roadmap appears first on lesson entry. Warmup shows image_emoji. PDF download button in summary uses client-side jsPDF.

mocked_api.pdf_generation: Client-side jsPDF - no backend API needed
